meaning: n.使人毛骨悚然的东西,使人毛骨悚然的小说
examples: The film turned out to be a gripping thriller.
Fact and fiction merge together in his latest thriller.
The novel is a political thriller loosely based around current political issues.
So he uses a technique that he has mastered as a thriller writer: misdirection.
In "The Tomb, " a prison-escape thriller, Mr. Schwarzenegger sports gray-flecked hair and a matching goatee.
